nasb.text: Or what harmony has Christ with Belial, or what has a believer in common with an unbeliever?

esv.text: What accord has Christ with Belial? Or what portion does a believer share with an unbeliever?

cnv.text: 基督和彼列怎能和諧呢？信的和不信的有甚麼聯繫呢？

ccb.text: 基督与魔鬼怎能相容呢？信徒与非信徒有什么相干呢？

csbs.text: 基督与彼列有什么相融呢？信的与不信的有什么关系呢？
